comment: Demonstrates ROGERS duplicate ADIF bug: full QSO completes (logged correctly at ROGERS entry), then retries of TX4 exhaust. DX retries TX3 after our context is popped, creating a reincarnated context that logs a DUPLICATE ADIF with snr_tx=-99. Unlike the REPORT case, the original correct entry exists.

periods.comment: Period 3 (odd): DX sends TX3 (R-08) — acknowledges our report. REPORT+TX3 → ROGERS. QSO LOGGED here with rst_sent=-5, rst_rcvd=-8. CORRECT.
Period 4 (even): We send TX4 (RR73). ROGERS state, retry 1/5.
Period 5 (odd): DX doesn't respond (didn't decode our RR73)
Period 14: TX4 final retry — tick exhausts retries, context POPPED.
Period 15 (odd): DX retries TX3 (R-08) — they never got our RR73. No matching ctx → reincarnated context. EXPECT BUG: DUPLICATE ADIF with rst_sent=-99.
Period 16 (even): Reincarnated context sends TX4. Second ADIF logged with wrong rst_sent.
